parameters.subject: ={{ "🚨 " + $json.product + " Test Failed: " + $json.filename }}
parameters.message:
={{ "

🚨 Test Failure Alert

Product: " + $json.product + "

Test Script: " + $json.filename + "

Exit Code: " + $json.exitCode + "

Duration: " + ($json.duration || 'N/A') + "

Timestamp: " + $json.timestamp + "

Error Details:

" + (($json.stderr || $json.stdout || 'No output captured').substring(0, 800)) + "

This is an automated alert from the Playwright Product-Wise Automation workflow.

" }}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
={{ '📊 *' + $json.product + ' Test Suite Summary*

' + '✅ Passed: ' + $json.passed + '
' + '❌ Failed: ' + $json.failed + '
' + '📈 Total Tests: ' + $json.total + '
' + '🎯 Success Rate: ' + $json.successRate + '
' + '⏱️ Total Duration: ' + $json.totalDuration }}
